---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Environment

- GrapeStrap version: (Help → About → version, or `grapestrap --version`)
- Distro & version: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, Fedora 40, Arch as of YYYY-MM-DD)
- Display protocol: X11 / Wayland (run `echo $XDG_SESSION_TYPE`)
- Install method: .deb / AppImage / tar.gz / Flatpak / Snap / built from source
- Plugins enabled (if relevant): paste from Preferences → Plugins

## Logs

Attach `$XDG_DATA_HOME/GrapeStrap/logs/main.log` (often `~/.local/share/GrapeStrap/logs/main.log`). Sanitize anything project-confidential first.

## Screenshot or screencast

If visual.

## Additional context

Anything else worth mentioning.
